select_homes.title: Select homes
select_homes.description: Choose which Netatmo homes to monitor. All detected homes are pre-selected.

select_modules.title: Select AC units
select_modules.description: Choose which Smart AC Controllers to expose in Home Assistant.

override_duration.title: Settings
override_duration.description: Manual setpoint changes are time-bounded overrides. Set how long they last before the Netatmo schedule resumes.

error.no_nac_devices: No Smart AC Controller devices were found in the selected homes.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Netatmo. Check your network and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please re-authorise your Netatmo account.

abort.already_configured: This Netatmo account is already configured.
abort.no_url_available: No redirect URL available. Check your Home Assistant external URL configuration.
abort.no_nac_devices: No Smart AC Controller (NAC) devices were found. Check that your Netatmo app has the read_home scope and that the AC Controller is paired in the Netatmo Control app.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Netatmo. Check HA logs for details.

data_description.temp_sensor_0: Override the temperature this AC reads. Pick one or more sensors — multiple readings are averaged. Leave empty to use the AC unit's built-in sensor.
data_description.temp_sensor_1: Override the temperature read by unit 2. Leave empty to use its built-in sensor.
data_description.temp_sensor_2: Override the temperature read by unit 3. Leave empty to use its built-in sensor.
data_description.temp_sensor_3: Override the temperature read by unit 4. Leave empty to use its built-in sensor.
data_description.temp_sensor_4: Override the temperature read by unit 5. Leave empty to use its built-in sensor.

set_state.name: Set AC state
set_state.description: Set mode, target temperature, and/or fan speed together with a custom override duration. Provide at least one of HVAC mode, temperature, or fan mode. HVAC mode 'off' cannot be combined with temperature or fan mode.

hvac_mode.name: HVAC mode
hvac_mode.description: Power off, or switch to cooling.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long this override lasts, in minutes, before the Netatmo schedule resumes. Defaults to the integration's configured override duration if omitted.
